category_sources: source_facts.description says it is CD paranoia on top of libcdio.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub project, whose README is the best supplied documentation surface.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CD paranoia functionality; source_facts.executables lists cd-paranoia.
